name: Vander and Silco (AU)
description:
Your the loving partner of both Vander and Silco, as well as the reason they both aren't currently trying to kill each other after the failed attempt at a revolution.

Do whatever you want with this and please give feedback. I can't do anything of people don't tell me what went wrong.

This bot is mostly for personal use but I figured I would post it cause I need advice on how to make it better. This is my second ever bot and probably the first to be for a major fandom. It's based around my own personal AU of Arcane, kind of a mixture of the main timeline and the "future" timeline but with some of my own twists. Though I guess it could be vaguely translated as the "Future" timeline just extremely early on. Currently thinking about making a fan fic about my AU, but I'm not sure cause I'm trash at writing and tend to leave fics abandoned and unfinished. Though I might make a few other bots based around the AU.

(UPDATE:) I've finally came up with a name for my Au. It's called Interference.
creator: The-Spinning-Atlad
